thesis: PRE-MARKET window ~7:18am ET Monday 7/20 (generated 2026-07-20T11:18:21Z, marketClosed=false) — the first cash session AFTER Friday's monthly OPEX, planning TODAY's open. No Monday bar has printed yet, so STRUCTURE FIRST is read off the most-recent CONFIRMED completed daily bar, Friday's 7/17 close; the plan is unchanged in substance from the weekend since no new bar exists. This run refreshed the bars cache (updated 2026-07-20T11:18:16Z, 285 series), the sector RRG tool read (asOf 2026-07-20T11:18:20Z), the real-assets BTC-USD sub-read (2026-07-20T00:00Z, 43.2 / Mixed) and a fresh VIX read (18.32, eased modestly from Friday's 18.77 close but still firm vs the ~16.4-16.7 reads on 7/16); ETF-momentum, global-rotation and the rest of the real-assets reads are still CARRIED from Friday's 2026-07-17T13:30Z run. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: 7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17 = 7 (7/17 confirmed; the weekend adds no bar and intraday reruns are NOT counted). STRUCTURAL FRAME off the 7/17 close: SPY 743.29 stays bull-stacked (20>50>200) but closed the week essentially AT its rising 50-day (+0.01%, ~743.2) and -1.89% off the 52-week high (~757.6); mom126/252 +8.24%/+20.39% — a healthy tech-led bull DIGESTING near all-time highs with the 50-day the line into today's open. Three features intact: (1) QQQ 695.33 remains OUT of its bull-stack — TANGLED and -3.23% below its 50-day (~718.5, mom5 -4.16), the reclaim it never won still unwon; (2) the lone structural crack MSFT (393.82) is clawing back toward its 50-day — now -1.87% below the line (~401.3, mom5 +2.26) but STILL bear-stacked and -10.06% under its 200-day (~437.9), contesting the reclaim from below, not through it; (3) the stretched momentum/semis leaders stayed heavy (SPMO mom5 -6.41, VGT -4.22, SOXX rsMom1m -11.06 now Lagging, 0/12 up-momentum, 1/12 above the 50-day). The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED and energy-led on this run's fresh RRG: XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.3>100, accel +2.43 board-best, rsMom 102.8 board-best, +12.54% >200d, rotation into) with oil firming (USO Uptrend 47.4 mom21 +7.35, BNO Uptrend 50.5 mom21 +10.96, DBC broad-commodity Uptrend 52.8 — carried from Friday 13:30Z); the sector model's live read is 'Rotate toward XLE as XLV weakens' (XLV Weakening, accel -2.56 the worst on the board); XLRE stays Leading while XLF (Peaking) and XLP roll and XLV/XLI Weakening. VIX 18.32 is LOW but FIRM (fresh this-run read, off Friday's 18.77) — under the 3-point single-reference regime-change threshold but the multi-session firming persists. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior OPEX pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; Monday's gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. Plan into today's open: HOLD the bull-stack (do NOT add index beta with SPY on its 50-day, QQQ tangled below its 50-day and vol firm); watch the overnight Asia/Europe tape and whether SPY holds ~743.2 / QQQ reclaims ~718.5 at the open; ROTATE toward the now-Leading, oil-confirmed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, rolling semis into any relief; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it contests its 50-day from below, into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
